printed.name: Tendon Stretch
printed.setup: Facing risers, hands placed on footbar, shoulder width apart, fingers facing feet, arms straight, feet dorsiflexed placed on front edge of carriage, trunk rounded

movement.exhale: Lift trunk, moving carriage back to stopper, return to start position

cues: Keep head aligned with spine, eyes directed toward body
Press heels down throughout, front edge of carriage under balls of feet
